Class epp.InnerClassEnv 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----epp.InnerClassEnv
public class InnerClassEnv
extends Object
The InnerClassEnv class implements the name environment of the inner class within the type checking pass.

This class is currently not used.

See Also:
VarEnv

InnerClassEnv(Symbol, ClassInfo, InnerClassEnv)

InnerClassEnv 
 public InnerClassEnv(Symbol name,
                      ClassInfo info,
                      InnerClassEnv next)
